title: Principal Site Reliability Engineer - Observability
score_reasoning: This Principal SRE role at Elastic aligns well with your observability expertise (OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Grafana) and distributed systems background. You meet the core practitioner requirement: production infrastructure experience, Kubernetes and CSP familiarity (AWS ECS), and observability tool proficiency. Spain's timezone (±1h from Berlin) and the implicit remote flexibility suit your preferences. However, the role requires Kubernetes mastery at scale and AI coding agent proficiency—you lack hands-on Kubernetes experience (a notable gap for Principal-level SRE work), and there is no evidence of AI coding agent workflows in your profile. The Principal title is also a step above your current Senior level; while your 7 years and impact at Velox (zero-downtime migration framework, multi-team scope) demonstrate systems thinking, the Principal scope assumes you lead infrastructure strategy and guide other engineers at an organizational level. This is a stretch upward in seniority. Growth potential is moderate—strong observability alignment but leadership expectations may exceed your current trajectory.

red_flags: Kubernetes proficiency required; you have Docker experience only (critical gap for SRE at scale)
AI coding agents listed as requirement; no evidence in your profile
Principal-level title suggests organizational leadership scope; you are at Senior level
Role emphasizes Elastic Stack user experience design; limited evidence of product design collaboration in your background
